headline: A Look At KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation As Shares Show Mixed Short And Long Term Returns
summary: KeyCorp stock moves with mixed recent returns and solid profitability metrics KeyCorp (KEY) has drawn fresh investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down over the past week and past 3 months, yet still showing a gain year to date. See our latest analysis for KeyCorp. Recent moves show short term momentum fading, with the 7 day share price return down 2.70% and the 90 day share price return down 5.59%, even as the 1 year total shareholder return sits at...
